---
title: "debug_perf.py"
path: "C:/Users/Craig/Corvus/CorvusStar/src/tools/debug/debug_perf.py"
loc: 39
complexity: 4
logic_score: 4.95
style_score: 3.77
intel_score: 5.50
overall_score: 5.66
---

## Intent
Python module facilitating run_profile. It exists to support broader Python integration routines. Its role in the system is to provide foundational utilities for script execution.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 4.9/10
- **Style [S]**: 3.8/10
- **Intel [I]**: 5.5/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 9 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [time](file://time)
- [pathlib](file://pathlib)
- [src.core.engine.vector](file://src.core.engine.vector)

### Exports
- `run_profile`
